issue_title: Change color of ChromeOS App window to blue. Fix #1403
issue_body_preview:
[UI Improvement] Changes color of Chrome OS app window frame to blue.

Before:
![nocolor](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/13156162/25864724/7c55e51c-34be-11e7-843c-594fa5da81ab.png)

After:
![color](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/13156162/25864737/86003c70-34be-11e7-9e97
test_description_zh: 在 Chrome OS 环境下打开 Webogram 应用，观察应用窗口顶部边框/标题栏的颜色。
expected_result_zh: Chrome OS 应用窗口的标题栏/边框颜色应为蓝色，与 Telegram 品牌色调一致，而非默认的灰色或无色。
